title: SWD attends mini cricket national seminar
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS  -  The 2024 Cricket South Africa KFC Mini Cricket national seminar was held at the Arabella Hotel, Golf and Spa in Hermanus this week, with the theme “Building for the Future”.This year, 152 volunteer coaches and coordinators from across South Africa attended the event.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The 2024 Cricket South Africa KFC Mini Cricket national seminar was held at the Arabella Hotel, Golf and Spa in Hermanus this week, with the theme “Building for the Future”.
This year, 152 volunteer coaches and coordinators from across South Africa attended the event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The volunteers and coaches are the driving force behind the success of the KFC Mini Cricket programme, which benefits overs 126 000 young children across the country.","html":"The volunteers and coaches are the driving force behind the success of the KFC Mini Cricket programme, which benefits overs 126 000 young children across the country."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The SWD cricket delegates who attended the event were Merlin Masimela (SWD Cricket KFC Mini Cricket coordinator), Cheslan Cloete, Kirsten Levack, Marinel Pretorius, Patricia Rex, Marianette Gelant, Camerentia Titus and Limpho Ntshudu.","html":"The SWD cricket delegates who attended the event were Merlin Masimela (SWD Cricket KFC Mini Cricket coordinator), Cheslan Cloete, Kirsten Levack, Marinel Pretorius, Patricia Rex, Marianette Gelant, Camerentia Titus and Limpho Ntshudu."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: SWD attends mini cricket national seminar
